name: Arduino Cloud
description: Arduino Cloud — Managed IoT platform for provisioning, over-the-air updates, and time-series data from Arduino and ESP32 devices.

seo.title: Arduino Cloud — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Arduino Cloud: Arduino Cloud — Managed IoT platform for provisioning, over-the-air updates, and time-series data from Arduino and ESP32 devices.

when_to_use: Provisioning Arduino and ESP32 devices at fleet scale
Over-the-air firmware updates for deployed IoT hardware
Storing and visualizing time-series sensor readings from devices
Remote monitoring of Arduino-based environmental sensors
Managing IoT device state via MQTT without a custom broker

pros: Seamless with Arduino and ESP32 boards
cons: Pricing tiers restrict variables and devices
review.verdict: Great for makers and classroom IoT, underpowered for production fleets above a few thousand devices.
review.best_for: Hobbyists, educators, and small IoT prototypes on Arduino hardware
review.not_for: Industrial IoT deployments needing custom protocols at scale

lock_in.reason: IoT platform, devices via std protocols
